title: Client Optimized
description: Mostly client-side optimization pack. FPS boosts, better visuals, and QoL additions without altering vanilla gameplay. Vanilla server compatible.
body:
## Overview

**Client Optimized is a modpack that adds performance, visual, and client-side quality-of-life mods. It does not change gameplay mechanics.**

## Client-Side Behavior

**Most included mods are fully client-side. A few are not strictly client-side, but they do not cause issues when hosting worlds or when vanilla players connect.**

## Quality of Life Features

**The pack includes small interface and usability adjustments that operate only on the client and do not modify world data.**

## Multiplayer Compatibility

**Players can join vanilla servers and most modded servers normally. Some servers may restrict specific features depending on their configuration.**

## Warnings

**Some mods included in this pack may be detected or blocked by server anticheat systems. On certain servers, this can result in kicks, restrictions, or bans. Users should review server rules and allowed-mods lists before joining.**

## World Hosting

**Worlds hosted with this modpack can be joined by vanilla clients without additional configuration.**

## Intent

**The modpack compiles commonly used client-side performance, visual, and quality-of-life mods into one setup.**
